post_install.subtitle: ONCard introduces QNS-1, redesigned creation workflows, and tighter cloud model limits.
post_install.text1:
ONCard introduces QNS-1, a custom Wikipedia summarization model delivering up to 20× faster, cleaner, and more readable summaries directly inside search results.

Card creation has also been redesigned with dedicated FTC and Question Creation workflows, queue-based processing, adaptive MCQ grading, and new AI-powered thinking modes.

Free Ollama cloud access is now limited to Gemma 4 31B model
post_install.summary_text: ONCard 1.5.9 introduces QNS-1, redesigned creation workflows, adaptive MCQ grading, and Gemma 4 31B as the only free cloud model.
post_install.text2:
ONCard introduces QNS-1, a custom Wikipedia summarization model delivering up to 20× faster, cleaner, and more readable summaries directly inside search results.

Card creation has also been redesigned with dedicated FTC and Question Creation workflows, queue-based processing, adaptive MCQ grading, and new AI-powered thinking modes.

Free Ollama cloud access is now limited to Gemma 4 31B model

whats_new.title: It's Better When It's Yours...
whats_new.description: The UI has been fully redesigned with cleaner animations, more native-feeling widgets, and a smoother overall experience. Settings Search is now powered by semantic search, allowing users to find features based on what they want to do instead of remembering exact setting names.
whats_new.closing_description: QNS-1 (QyrouNnet-Summarizer-1) is a free and open-source summarization model developed by ONCard, delivering up to 20× faster generation than traditional 8B models while achieving performance comparable to, or exceeding, larger 24B models across benchmarks such as FactCC and SummaC. Available on Ollama.
